name: Federal Contract Opportunities Feed
description: Real-time feed of federal contract opportunities. Search by NAICS code, agency, state, or keyword. Includes solicitation type, response deadline, award value, and contracting office details.

name: Federal Award History Tracker
description: Historical federal contract award records. Track awarded contracts by recipient, agency, or date range. Includes award amount, recipient details, and contract performance data.

name: Set-Aside Contract Feed for Small Business
description: Federal set-aside contract opportunities filtered by socio-economic category (SDVOSB, WOSB, HUBZone, 8(a)). Includes eligibility requirements and response deadlines.

name: Entity Registration Verification
description: Verify business entity registration status, exclusion/debarment flags, set-aside eligibility, and NAICS codes. Check if a contractor is registered and in good standing.

name: Federal Spending by Agency
description: Federal spending breakdown by agency, category, and geographic distribution. Track obligation and outlay amounts across fiscal years.

name: Excluded Parties Check
description: Check if an entity is on the federal excluded/debarred parties list. Cross-reference recipient records with award history for compliance screening.

parameters.name: entity_name
parameters.description: Entity or contractor name to check

name: Annual Financial Report Filings
description: Annual financial report filings for any public company. Retrieve filing dates, accession numbers, and direct links to full reports. Includes balance sheet, income statement, and cash flow data.

name: Quarterly Financial Report Filings
description: Quarterly financial report filings for any public company. Retrieve filing dates, accession numbers, and links to full quarterly reports.

name: Material Event Filings Feed
description: Real-time material event filings for any public company. Includes event type, filing date, and summary for event-driven trading and monitoring.

name: Insider Trading Activity Tracker
description: Insider trading transaction filings for any public company. Track executive buys, sells, and option exercises with transaction dates, share counts, and prices.

name: Institutional Holdings Filings
description: Quarterly institutional investment manager holdings filings. Retrieve position-level data for funds and institutions with filing URLs to full holdings tables.

name: Activist Investor Filings
description: Activist investor 5%+ stake filings for any ticker. Track filer name, form type, filing date, and stake percentage for activist position monitoring.

name: Warning Letters Feed
description: Regulatory warning letters issued to companies. Includes company name, subject, issued date, issuing office, and product type. Filter by company or product.

name: Drug Recall Alerts
description: Drug and medical device recall enforcement reports. Track recall events by drug name, recall class, and date. Includes recalling firm and recall reason.

name: Adverse Event Reports
description: Adverse event reports for drugs and medical products. Includes reaction type, severity, patient outcomes, and report dates. Filter by drug name.

name: Environmental Violation Records
description: Facility environmental enforcement and violation records. Includes inspection counts, penalty amounts, and compliance status. Filter by facility, state, or industry code.

name: Workplace Safety Inspection Records
description: Workplace safety inspection records with activity type, citations, penalties, and open/closed status. Filter by employer name, state, or industry code.

name: Campaign Finance Data
description: Campaign finance data with receipts, disbursements, party affiliation, office sought, and election cycle. Filter by candidate, committee, or cycle.

name: Legislation Search
description: Search legislation by keyword, session number, and bill status. Includes sponsor, cosponsors, bill text, and legislative action history.

name: Lobbying Disclosures Feed
description: Lobbying registration and disclosure filings. Includes client, registrant, issue areas, and reported amounts. Filter by client, registrant, or issue code.

parameters.name: issue
parameters.description: Issue area code (e.g. TAX, HCR, DEF)

name: Economic Indicators Dashboard
description: Economic indicators including GDP, inflation, unemployment, interest rates, and consumer sentiment. Filter by indicator series ID or category.

name: Perpetual Futures Funding Rates
description: Aggregated funding rates across major perpetual futures exchanges. Track funding by coin, exchange, or time range. Includes prediction, basis, and spread data.

name: Market Regime Indicator
description: Market regime classification (risk-on, risk-off, transition) based on liquidity, volatility, and sentiment factors. Includes regime score and directional bias.

name: DeFi Yield Rates Aggregator
description: DeFi yield rates across 15000+ liquidity pools. Filter by minimum APY, minimum TVL, chain, or protocol. Includes risk scores and TVL data.

name: DeFi TVL Rankings
description: Total Value Locked rankings across 7800+ DeFi protocols. Filter by chain, category, or top N. Includes 24h/7d/1m changes and market cap data.

name: Airdrop Eligibility Scanner
description: Check wallet address for eligible airdrops across multiple blockchains. Returns claimable amounts, deadlines, and claim links.

name: Wallet Analysis Tool
description: On-chain wallet analysis including net worth, holdings, risk score, DeFi positions, and behavioral flags. Supports multiple blockchains.

name: Gas Price Tracker
description: Real-time gas prices and transaction cost estimates across multiple blockchains. Includes priority fee recommendations and historical trends.

parameters.name: chain
parameters.description: Chain key e.g. ethereum, base, arbitrum, polygon

parameters.name: unit
parameters.description: Return unit preference: gwei or usd

name: Trending Tokens Scanner
description: Trending tokens by trading volume, price momentum, and top gainers. Filter by chain and limit results. Includes momentum scores.

name: Smart Money Flow Tracker
description: Smart money wallet activity tracker. Monitor whale buys, sells, and token flows. Filter by token or limit results for copy trading signals.

name: New Token Detection
description: Recently launched token detection across major DEXes. Includes liquidity, volume, holder count, and age. Filter by chain.

name: Liquidation Risk Monitor
description: Liquidation risk assessment for leveraged positions. Calculate liquidation prices, health factors, and risk levels for any wallet.

name: Token Risk Audit Scanner
description: Token risk audit including honeypot detection, rugpull risk, buy/sell tax analysis, ownership verification, and liquidity lock status.

name: Fact Check Oracle
description: Grounding oracle that fact-checks claims against live government and regulatory data sources. Returns verdict, confidence score, and supporting sources.

name: Entity Compliance Check
description: Business entity compliance check including registration status, exclusion flags, set-aside eligibility, and industry code verification.

name: Macro Regime Analysis
description: Macro market regime analysis with liquidity outlook, forward view, and trade thesis. Classifies market as risk-on, risk-off, or transition. Includes asset recommendations and risk/reward ratios.

parameters.name: query
parameters.description: The macro question or scenario to analyze

name: Compliance Anomaly Reporter
description: Submit compliance anomalies for swarm-based scoring. Detects AML flags, financial crime indicators, and risk patterns. Returns severity score.

name: Bank Compliance Audit
description: Full compliance audit cycle for financial institutions. Includes regulatory audit scoring, risk assessment, and compliance status dashboard.

name: Regulatory Compliance Query
description: Real-time regulatory compliance dashboard for financial institutions. Query compliance status, open issues, and regulatory findings.

name: Rugpull Detector
description: Real-time rugpull risk detection for any token. Monitors liquidity removal, developer wallet activity, and contract manipulation patterns. Returns risk score and warning flags.

name: API Documentation Catalog
description: Full API catalog with pricing, schemas, and data sources for all available endpoints. Includes example requests and response formats.

name: Capabilities Introspection Endpoint
description: Free introspection endpoint returning the complete offering catalog with names, descriptions, prices, SLA minutes, and subscription options.

parameters.name: module
parameters.description: Module or product area to introspect

name: DeFi Yield API Catalog
description: Catalog page for DeFi yield rate endpoints. Lists all available yield farming and APY aggregation endpoints with parameters and examples.

name: Token Risk Detection API Catalog
description: Catalog page for honeypot and rugpull detection endpoints. Lists all available token risk scanning endpoints with parameters and examples.

name: Perpetual Futures Funding API Catalog
description: Catalog page for funding rate and perpetual futures data endpoints. Lists all available funding rate endpoints with parameters and examples.

name: Trending Tokens API Catalog
description: Catalog page for trending token scanner endpoints. Lists all available trending detection endpoints with parameters and examples.

name: Wallet Analysis API Catalog
description: Catalog page for wallet analysis and wallet analyzer endpoints. Lists all available wallet intelligence endpoints with parameters and examples.
